# Hickoku Perfumes

> Hickoku is an affordable premium perfume and attar brand based in India. We craft alcohol-free attars and long-lasting fragrances designed for emotion, memory, and individuality. Shop online at www.hickoku.com.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.hickoku.com/)
- [Collection](https://www.hickoku.com/collection)
- [About Us](https://www.hickoku.com/about-us)
- [Why Choose Us](https://www.hickoku.com/why-choose-us)
- [Contact Us](https://www.hickoku.com/contact-us)

## Policies

- [Shipping Policy](https://www.hickoku.com/shipping-policy)
- [Return & Refund Policy](https://www.hickoku.com/return-policy)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.hickoku.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms & Conditions](https://www.hickoku.com/tnc)

## Support

- [FAQ / Help Center](https://www.hickoku.com/faq)

## Brand Information

- Brand Name: Hickoku
- Category: Perfumes, Attars, Fragrances
- Market: India
- Price Range: Starting from ₹249
- Key Features: Alcohol-free options, long-lasting formulations, premium quality at affordable prices
- Powered by: Zaviyar Corporation

## Current Product Catalog

1. **Velvira** - Romantic Floral Attar
   - URL: https://www.hickoku.com/product/velvira
2. **Raafa** - Floral powdery attar
   - URL: https://www.hickoku.com/product/raafa
3. **Roselia** - Soft Rose Attar
   - URL: https://www.hickoku.com/product/roselia
4. **Nufra** - White Floral Attar
   - URL: https://www.hickoku.com/product/nufra
5. **Silk Musk** - Clean Musk Attar
   - URL: https://www.hickoku.com/product/silk-musk
6. **Midnight Agar** - Intense Oud Attar
   - URL: https://www.hickoku.com/product/midnight-agar
7. **Lumiflora** (For Her) - Fresh Floral Fruity Attar
   - URL: https://www.hickoku.com/product/lumiflora
8. **Zafera** - Warm Oriental Attar
   - URL: https://www.hickoku.com/product/zafera
